channel.title: LLM Timeline — Nous Research Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Nous Research.

item.title: Nomos 1 (Nous Research)
item.description: Parameters: 30B License: open Type: model AI model by Nous Research

item.title: Hermes 4 (Nous Research)
item.description: Parameters: Hermes 4 License: open Type: model Based on Llama 3. Announce: https://hermes4.nousresearch.com/

item.title: DeepHermes 3 - Mistral 24B (Nous Research)
item.description: Parameters: 24B License: open Type: model AI model by Nous Research

item.title: Deephermes 3 Llama 3 8B Preview (Nous Research)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model AI model by Nous Research

item.title: DeepHermes 3 Preview (Nous Research)
item.description: Parameters: DeepHermes 3 Preview License: open Type: model Based on Llama 3 8B. GPQA score based on GPT-4o's analysis of the chart :-/ "one of the first models in the world to unify Reasoning (long chains of thought that improve answer accuracy) and normal LLM response modes into one model." https://x.com/NousResearch/status/1890148004029759612

item.title: DisTrO 15B (Nous Research)
item.description: Parameters: DisTrO 15B License: open Type: model "About 14 DGXes scattered around the globe. Sometimes more sometimes less, it varies depending on availability. On average, around 112 H100s." https://x.com/bloc97_/status/1863675225810043331 "we introduce DisTrO, a family of architecture-agnostic and network-agnostic distributed optimizers that reduces the inter-GPU communication requirements by four to five orders of magnitude without relying on amortized analysis, enabling low-latency training of large neural networks on slow internet bandwidths with heterogeneous networking hardware."

item.title: DISTRO (Nous Research)
item.description: Parameters: 1.2B License: closed Type: model AI model by Nous Research

item.title: Hermes 3 405B (Nous Research)
item.description: Parameters: 405B License: open Type: model AI model by Nous Research

item.title: Hermes 3 70B (Nous Research)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model AI model by Nous Research

item.title: Hermes 3 8B (Nous Research)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model AI model by Nous Research

item.title: OLMo-Bitnet-1B (Nous Research)
item.description: Parameters: OLMo-Bitnet-1B License: open Type: model 1.58-bit quantized (ternary weights) means we can run a 70B model in ~14GB VRAM. See also BitNet b1.58

item.title: Nous-Hermes-2-Yi-34B (Nous Research)
item.description: Parameters: 34B License: open Type: model AI model by Nous Research
